channel.title: Rhode Map | Boston Globe
channel.description: These are Providence's 'most endangered' properties for 2025

item.title: These are Providence's 'most endangered' properties for 2025
item.description: This story first appeared in Rhode Map, our free newsletter about Rhode Island that also contains information about local events, links to interesting stories, and more. ... Dan McGowan can be ...

item.title: Will Joe Shekarchi run for RI governor next year? - Yahoo
item.description: Boston Globe columnist Dan McGowan has a new report in Monday's edition of Rhode Map that is sure to fuel the speculation. In the video above, McGowan joined Kait Walsh on 12 News This Morning ...

item.title: From R.I. to Arizona, this political operative saw it all in 2024
item.description: RHODE MAP From R.I. to Arizona, this political operative saw it all in 2024 ... Dan McGowan can be reached at dan.mcgowan@globe.com. Follow him @danmcgowan. Boston Globe Today. Follow Us .

item.title: Is Speaker Shekarchi preparing to jump into R.I. governor's race?
item.description: I was up bright and early to discuss today's edition of Rhode Map on "12 News This Morning." ... Dan McGowan can be reached at dan.mcgowan@globe.com. Follow him @danmcgowan. Boston Globe Today.
